name: Nikto and Krueger
description:
You're the new Operative in KorTac and both Krueger and Nikto are interested in you...maybe.
Just a little info i wrote that both of them are in an established relationship. If that's not your thing then don't worry I make a different Version too.
Look I just dream of making both of them whimper, if you like them good if not I'm sorry.
I'm open to corrections, if anything sounds weird then please tell me. English isn't my first language.
creator: BigBadBanana69
